title: Ethiopian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish combining the spices of Ethiopia with the warmth of a traditional tagine.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the nutty spice blend, tagine spice mix, and berbere spice. Cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the almond butter and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped apricots, chickpeas, and coconut milk. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro, if desired.
Serve over basmati rice or with naan bread.
